inputs.text: Portrait of a stunning Korean woman with natural black hair showing blue sheen styled in twin low buns, diamond face shape with defined sculptured brows, dreamy ethereal expression gazing into the distance. Profile view captured through an ornate wooden archway framing her silhouette against a busy night market alive with golden and amber bokeh lights. She wears sleek black athletic wear with a cropped zip-up jacket, sporty chic styling. Overcast soft diffused light wraps her flawless porcelain skin with gentle luminosity while warm market glow creates painterly contrast behind her. Shot on 85mm f/1.4 lens producing creamy bokeh, cinematic color grading with teal and warm amber tones, dramatic shadows sculpting her jawline, editorial fashion photography, ultra detailed, photorealistic.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, oversaturated, harsh lighting, plastic skin
